decision: Use SAMD21 sensor-hub plus project-specific servo blocks
rationale: Avoid mislabeling the 24 V robotics template as a mini-servo design.

decision: Separate USB logic power from fused 2S-to-5 V servo power
rationale: Reduce servo brownout coupling and enable hardware cutoff.

decision: Direct hardware E-stop plus IMU heartbeat watchdog
rationale: E-stop disables buck and PWM independently; firmware monitors MCU-visible liveness.

decision: Use generated torso enclosure, controller bracket, and harness clip
rationale: Available part types cover the controller body but not articulated leg links.
